/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/grammar/LTLLexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/grammar/LTLParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/src/ast/ast_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/src/ast/ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/src/ast/ast_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/src/ltl_to_gnba_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/src/persistence_checker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LTL_checker.dir/src/ts.cpp.o -o LTL_checker   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -lantlr4-runtime -lfmt
